role: This directory contains demonstration assets for ArchSpine, including a GIF and a demo project source code with intentional architectural flaws.
responsibility: Together, these components provide a visual demo (GIF) and a code example that showcases a user management system with a deliberately broken architecture, highlighting the consequences of bypassing domain layers.

children.role: Binary image file (GIF) – not a narrative project document
Source code directory of a demo project for the ArchSpine mirror system, containing API, domain, and infrastructure layers for user management.
